--Game launches in 2026. Rated E.

--Available on PS5, Xbox, Steam. It will have Crossplay.

--Includes NBA all-stars Giannis Antetokounmpo, Lamelo Ball, Stephen Curry, Luka Dončić, https://t.co/S3Rk4Vcrza
2K has declined to comment on the "Players Over Profits" social media campaign.

@Dom_2k The aura was insane with this series.

—Stadium Pulse system will add clock distortion, extreme screen shake, and rattled HUDs in rivalry and playoff games.

—Metallica’s electric “Enter Sandman” https://t.co/HLHJrBNCnB

@nut_history Red Sox jersey nailed it, if true. Absolutely perfect Green Monster vibes.
This exchange is highly worth watching. Every news network will be talking about this weekend >>

I’m sorry y’all but #Paradise is in the running for best television show of the year. The latest episode, “The Day,” was one of the most intense and exceptional episodes of television I’ve watched in years. A must watch! https://t.co/EQYG8wvvnb

I only saw 30 minutes of #CaptainAmericaBraveNewWorld so here are some thoughts: 

Absolute blast. All-in on the story. It just checked so many boxes for me.

Felt like an MCU movie where other projects actually matter again. Lots of cohesion. 

Mackie rocks, Ford is great. https://t.co/pl6828092T
@Jumpman_Germ Is that in MyNBA? Great find.
@MarveIFacts Going to be quite a moment when Doom walks through the arena with a number of fallen Kang bodies around him.
@ShamsCharania Similar vibes next season: https://t.co/NqYbxZqsO6
@ShamsCharania Big day for Herbs.

This tracks with what I experienced at WrestleMania. 

The PR team called on specific people, reporters weren’t allowed into the presser despite being told to attend it, different reps had different attitudes and directions. Just seemed like a mess. 

I asked a PR person if all
@kendricklamar Nah this is crazy
NBA2K accused of using Kobe Bryant reward to trick gamers into wasting their time https://t.co/Ahm6jYDymc

NEW -- A 2K source tells me that the company is aware of the community's reaction to the WhatsTheStatus ban and other key issues surrounding #WWE2K24.

The company plans to address these concerns soon, source said, though no timeline was given.

“We are aware of community https://t.co/U36GzdTHLM
@DBGyt_ Insane to me when people don’t recognize Jokic as an all-time great this point.

The first 8 episodes of the #TheBadBatch Season 3 are a thrilling return to a galaxy far, far away. 

--The opening three episodes play out like a Star Wars cinematic adventure with cloning mysteries, Empire intrigue, space dogfights, stunning artwork. Plenty to sink your teeth https://t.co/cb9E0zmF4M
@Dom_2k The fact that this isn’t misinformation aged me by 10 years.
@WrestleOps @CurrentlyCoyne This is going to be a war.
@WWE Chills.
@WrestleOps It’s real. It’s damn real

My early #TheMarvels review — 

—Yes.  So much yes. 

—This film is so much fun and exactly what a comic book movie should be. It’s funny, silly, short and sweet, action-packed. Loved the cosmic sci-fi moments. Plenty of MCU interconnectivity without being overbearing. 

—We will https://t.co/ANzu9cQ9MH
Presented without comment. https://t.co/BUwTnUKdb9
@WrestleOps 1.5 million watched pro wrestling on a Tuesday. Huge win for the industry.
@WrestlingHumble Imagine if his first match back in WWE is an Iron Man match though.
@KeiziTV Imagine an MCU where we haven’t seen Kang in full yet and this is only his second reference/inclusion. Insane.
@PopCrave @CriticalOverlo3 Ghostface showing up in December after taking the Halloween season off: https://t.co/kQJaZQeCKD
@SeanRossSapp Shelton Benjamin will always be a GOAT to me. Tremendous talent and was unstoppable in his prime. This sucks.

NEWS: Sen. Rick Scott (R-Fla.) is spending part of his congressional recess on a luxury yacht in Italy with his family, Axios has learned.

--This comes after he criticized President Biden for vacationing in Delaware.

 https://t.co/HawAaAwIfD
NEW by me -- Florida medical board looks to block gender-affirming treatments for minors https://t.co/4G6rysYRgW
Little extra note -- the #NBA2K23 Championship Edition comes with a 12-month subscription to @NBA League Pass

NEWS -- NBA 2K23 will be released worldwide on September 9, 2022.

--Preorders begin July 7.

--Jordan Challenges from 2K11 are back. 

--All the challenges + new ones have been added.

--Challenges will include NBA moments and Team USA moments. https://t.co/5PoaUalukZ

BREAKING -- Uvalde CISD police chief Pete Arredondo has been placed on administrative leave effective immediately, said Dr. Hal Harrell, superintendent of Uvalde CISD.

https://t.co/TiTqk0PaHm

NEW from me -- Majority of Proud Boys indicted for sedition were U.S. military veterans.

--The indicted members include an Army veteran with a Purple Heart, two marines and a sailor recruit.

 https://t.co/gLj1W5gKcs
Trump loses bid to stay contempt order in New York AG probe https://t.co/wRhATd671n
Elizabeth Olsen said she is Wanda's lawyer -- she defends her to the end, no matter what she does. She will always defend Wanda's perspective. #DoctorStrange

Elizabeth Olsen said her approach for Wanda is different after #WandaVision. She said the show made Wanda grow into a mythic woman and accept her destiny.

"She has way more clarity now than ever." #DoctorStrange
McConnell won’t commit to hearings for Biden SCOTUS nominees if GOP retakes Senate https://t.co/IJ14Ha0wTx

Ethiopia civil war: Doctors among those begging for food in Tigray
https://t.co/HMtkzN1oa9

NEWS -- NBA 2K MyTeam will add a new @Candace_Parker coach card, which will give players improved stats. This is the first time a #WNBA star will be included in the MyTeam mode.

https://t.co/MlIFy4ZMC9 https://t.co/xTxFkZ1OSi

#Eternals REVIEW -- Well, #Eternals is huge in cast, story, scale. It's beautifully told with excellent music, acting and pacing. It's one of the more "cinema" Marvel movies to date and deserves a place in the upper tier of MCU films.

Early review for #JungleCruise — "Jungle Cruise" was a captivating film that's perfect for the summer. It's the family movie of the summer -- and there's no question about that. It's an epic ride that has love and heart at its core.

Scarlett Johansson says she hopes people remember Natasha for being endearing and never admitting when she's wrong. "She's curious about herself and curious about other people. I think it makes her stand out." #BlackWidow
Marvel Studios president Kevin Feige says that fans wanted more #BlackWidow stories because Scarlett Johansson was so good in the role.
Tom Hiddleston on his return to #Loki: “I just love playing the character and I always have. I feel so fortunate that I’m still here.”

Early review for #Loki — First two episodes are pure Marvel magic. Easily one of the best Marvel projects ever and that’s not exaggeration. This will wake up anyone who is tired of MCU projects. #Loki reminds us why Marvel is so good at what it does. (1/7) https://t.co/kIHf8j7Fnm
Paranormal Activity 3. https://t.co/bCyQc5AttL

The attack, which took place about five miles outside of La Mora, may have been a case of mistaken identity, some relatives said.

Relatives said three women and more than a dozen children were traveling in separate vehicles together from La Mora, a decades-old settlement in the state of Sonora founded by early members of Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
